text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking by the<n>training track...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet suddenly stops in the<n>middle of the
track.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I wonder if she injured herself<n>somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, it's nothing. I just popped a<n>blister,
that's all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Do you happen to have any<n>bandages on you?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to run some more, so I just<n>need to patch
this up real quick.
choice_data_list: Want me to do it for you?
You should go to the infirmary, just in case!
You should go to the infirmary, just in case!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to run some more, so I just<n>need to patch
this up real quick.
choice_data_list: Want me to do it for you?
You should go to the infirmary, just in case!
You should go to the infirmary, just in case!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, what a nice offer. How<n>considerate of you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll take you up on that. Make sure to<n>get the
tape on nice and tight!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hm, not bad. I think I can run on this.<n>Thanks. It
still hurts a little, but I guess<n>nothing can be done
about that.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Look, I said that I'm fine. Honestly,<n>you're
making a big deal out of<n>nothing.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But... I suppose I'd be able to run<n>with more
peace of mind if I get it<n>treated properly now...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Fine. I'll have the nurselook at it.
